title: Fostering artificial intelligence responsibility
summary: For legislation to promote employee physical and mental health and wellbeing by limiting the use of electronic monitoring tools. Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity
Hearing rescheduled to 09/11/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-2 and Virtual Hearing updated to include Virtual
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
